newsSince: On June 16, 2026 NKT marked the official commissioning of the $6bn Champlain Hudson Power Express HVDC line (Quebec to NYC, 400 kV, up to 1,250 MW), a turnkey project executed by NKT. This is an execution milestone; the record €13.5bn Transmission backlog and the Scotland/Eastern Green Link wins driving record quarterly order intake were already known and in the prior case.

sources.label: NKT marks Champlain Hudson HVDC inauguration (IndexBox)

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-passives lens: no fresh news since Jun 9; record EUR13.5B backlog and the EGL3/Scotland HVDC wins were already in the prior hold. NKT stays a grid/TSO name one step from the AI passive/power core this page rewards, so the thesis is unchanged -> hold rank 61, scoreDelta 0.
verdicts.bull: Record EUR13.5B backlog and largest-ever order (EGL3) give multi-year revenue visibility on the high-voltage backbone of the energy transition.
verdicts.neutral: Backlog is already known and priced; AI/datacenter exposure is indirect via grid reinforcement, not the passive/power bottleneck stack.
verdicts.bear: Underfollowed but +23% YTD near highs; grid/TSO demand is utility-driven, only loosely an AI-passive choke point; execution risk on mega-projects.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Continued record HVDC order intake / backlog conversion
verdicts.primaryRisk: Project execution; indirect AI tie limits alpha on this page
